title: Heaton-Harris, Chris - Secretary of State for Northern Ireland - ACOBA Advice
body: "The Rt Hon Chris Heaton-Harris left his role at the Northern Ireland Office in July 2024  Senior Advisor to the Chairman and CEO, Rivada Space Networks Gmbh  Mr Heaton-Harris  sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Rivada Space. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Non-Executive Director, XRail Group  Mr Heaton-Harris  sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with XRail Group. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Independent Consultancy and commissions  Mr Heaton-Harris sought the Committee’s advice about joining HH Advisory Services. An accessible version of the letter can be found here and taking on a commission with:    M2 Recovery. (An accessible version of the letter is available here.)    Chair of the Board of Trustees, The Reach for Health Centre Mr Heaton-Harris  sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with The Reach for Health Centre. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
